channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Digital Bros buys Wuchang: Fallen Feathers IP
item.content:encoded:
Digital Bros, the parent company of 505 Games, has announced that it has purchased the IP rights to Wuchang: Fallen Feathers from developer Lenzee. The approximate purchase price for the Wuchang: Fallen Feathers is €4 million. This deal gives Digital Bros total ownership of the series. The press release announcing the deal has also confirmed that by March 31st, 2026 over a million copies of Wuchang: Fallen Feathers have been sold.

In a further part of the statement, Digital Bros said, “Securing the IP will enhance the Group’s ability to make timely decisions regarding its future development and related investments. The Transaction is consistent with the Group’s strategy of increasing the share of fully owned intellectual property, supporting margin expansion and enhancing long-term value creation. The Group does not expect the acquisition to have a significant impact on the business outlook for the current fiscal year previously disclosed to the market.”

In our review for Wuchang: Fallen Feathers, Jason said, “Despite a fascinating premise, one inspired by both Chinese folklore and real-life history, Wuchang: Fallen Feathers resolutely fails to deliver on any of its initial early promise. This is a Soulslike by the numbers, one hampered by a cornucopia of PS5 performance issues that plague the game like a disease.”

Source: Press Release



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/04/28/digital-bros-buys-wuchang-fallen-feathers-ip/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
